name: context7
description: Up-to-date library documentation and code examples for any package

name: openviking
description: Context database for AI agents — tiered memory (L0/L1/L2), semantic retrieval, and automatic session-based memory extraction via a filesystem paradigm (viking://)
setup_instructions:
OpenViking uses a local Jina embedding model (no key needed).
Set your VLM provider API key and model in mcps/.env:

  OPENVIKING_VLM_API_KEY=your-key
  OPENVIKING_VLM_MODEL=claude-sonnet-4-6

Supported models (litellm format):
  Claude   -> claude-sonnet-4-6
  Kimi     -> moonshot/kimi-k2.5
  DeepSeek -> deepseek/deepseek-chat

Then re-run: ./install.sh
